faqs.question: What types of spiders are common in Lawrence, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Lawrence homes typically encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and occasionally brown recluse or black widow spiders. Our spider control service addresses all species, with special attention to identifying and safely removing venomous spiders that may pose health risks to your family.
